topic: 为什么自助餐吃不垮老板

segments.narration_zh: 几十块钱随便吃的自助餐，老板为什么不亏钱？
segments.visual_prompt_en: A person standing at a buffet entrance looking confused, holding a 50-yuan bill in one hand and an empty plate in the other. Above them floats a large question mark icon. Behind them, a warm inviting buffet restaurant entrance with food steam rising. Chinese text label on a simple sign: 「自助餐 ¥69/人」.

segments.narration_zh: 秘密不在菜好不好吃，而在于整个餐厅的精心布局。
segments.visual_prompt_en: Top-down floor plan view of a buffet restaurant transforming from a blurred mystery into a clear strategic layout. Arrows and dotted lines showing customer flow paths. Different food stations highlighted with colored zones. A magnifying glass icon revealing the word 「布局」 in Chinese below.

segments.narration_zh: 第一招：动线设计。贵的菜放在最深处，你走到之前就被填饱了。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A side-view cross section of a buffet line. At the entrance: large trays of fried rice, noodles, and bread with a person piling their plate high. Far at the back: small platters of shrimp and steak nearly out of reach. A dashed path line shows the journey. Chinese labels: 「入口」 at front, 「贵价区」 at the far end.

segments.narration_zh: 第二招：感官饱和。油炸高糖摆在最显眼处，三盘就腻了。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A buffet counter seen from customer eye level. Golden fried chicken and glossy glazed desserts dominate the foreground under warm spotlighting. Behind them, steamed vegetables and plain salads sit dimly lit. A speech bubble from the customer's head shows a stomach icon filling up rapidly with three checkmarks. Chinese sign: 「今日推荐」.

segments.narration_zh: 但这些只是前菜——真正的利润密码藏在食材成本里。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A dramatic scene transition: the buffet layout fades into the background as a large pie chart rises in the center. The chart shows two slices — a big one labeled 「食材成本 35%」 and the remaining slice 「利润与运营 65%」 in Chinese. A key icon unlocks the chart, revealing the hidden numbers behind the pie.

segments.narration_zh: 自助餐食材成本只占售价的三四成，每一分钱都算到极致。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A calculator and a shopping cart icon side by side with animated numbers flowing between them. Three icons in a row: a wholesale warehouse, a fixed menu checklist, and a chef hat with a line through it (meaning fewer chefs). Bar chart comparing buffet cost structure vs traditional restaurant. Chinese subtitle: 「批量采购 → 固定菜单 → 少厨师」.

segments.narration_zh: 当然，遇到专吃海鲜牛排的大胃王，老板也会头疼。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A humorous scene: a giant friendly character with a superhero cape labeled 「大胃王」 standing at a seafood station, holding a mountain of lobster and steak on a tiny plate. A small worried restaurant manager character peeking from behind a curtain, sweat drop on forehead, holding a calculator showing rising costs.

segments.narration_zh: 所以你会看到：寿司盘子故意很小、牛排档口永远在排队——全是设计好的。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A split-screen comparison. Left: tiny sushi plates on a conveyor belt, each holding just one piece, with a small plate icon and a ruler measurement. Right: a long queue of people at a steak carving station with a clock showing slow rotation. Connecting arrows reveal a blueprint grid underneath, labeled 「行为设计」 in Chinese.

segments.narration_zh: 自助餐赚的不是限制你吃的钱，而是让你「以为吃饱了」的钱。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A human brain icon with two thought bubbles. Left bubble: a person seeing a small pile of expensive seafood looking unsatisfied. Right bubble: the same person surrounded by cheap filling carbs looking happy and patting a full belly. A balance scale tips toward the right side. Chinese title at top: 「心理饱腹感」.

segments.narration_zh: 下次吃自助餐：第一轮拿贵的不拿饱的，小盘子多走少堆——这才是正确打法。
segments.visual_prompt_en: A confident character holding a small plate with premium items — shrimp, salmon sashimi, grilled meat — walking past fried rice and noodles toward the seafood section. A small checklist floats beside them with green checkmarks: 「先贵后廉」「小盘多走」「不堆不抢」 in Chinese. Bright, encouraging closing frame with soft beige background.

narration_script: 几十块钱随便吃的自助餐，老板为什么不亏钱？秘密不在菜好不好吃，而在于整个餐厅的精心布局。第一招：动线设计。贵的菜放在最深处，你走到之前就被填饱了。第二招：感官饱和。油炸高糖摆在最显眼处，三盘就腻了。但这些只是前菜——真正的利润密码藏在食材成本里。自助餐食材成本只占售价的三四成，每一分钱都算到极致。当然，遇到专吃海鲜牛排的大胃王，老板也会头疼。所以你会看到：寿司盘子故意很小、牛排档口永远在排队——全是设计好的。自助餐赚的不是限制你吃的钱，而是让你「以为吃饱了」的钱。下次吃自助餐：第一轮拿贵的不拿饱的，小盘子多走少堆——这才是正确打法。
